# Total Reward

> Total Reward is a compensation platform for HR and Total Rewards teams. Design salary structures, plan bonuses, run merit cycles, and manage allowances in one place — with full Arabic and English support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, modules, and how Total Reward helps comp teams.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans, included features, employee/user limits, and FAQ.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on compensation strategy, salary structures, bonus design, merit cycles, and pay equity.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Total Reward team for questions, demos, or support.
